expected_behavior: Flags the placeholder/non-intention-revealing names (check, x, res, mode)
Flags the magic numbers (7, 4, 750) and recommends named constants
Flags the deep nesting and recommends guard clauses / early returns to flatten the happy path
Flags the comment/code contradiction (comment says 30 seconds, constant is 60,000 ms)
Flags the commented-out code for deletion (version control is the archive)
Flags the mechanism-encoding name callBackendViaOkHttpPost and suggests an intent-revealing name like callBackend
Does not flag the obvious literal 1 or demand comments on already-clear code
Recognizes the names are intention-revealing and the structure is flat
